debug_info.goal:
xs ys : List ℕ
h : ∀ x ∈ xs, (xs ++ ys).head! ≤ x
⊢ (∀ x ∈ ys, (xs ++ ys).head! ≤ x) → ∀ x ∈ ys, ys.head! ≤ x

failed_attempts:
intro h2 x hx
   cases ys with
   | nil => simp at hx
   | cons y ys' =>
     have hy : y ∈ (y :: ys') := List.mem_cons_self y ys'
     have h3 : (xs ++ y :: ys').head! ≤ y := h2 y hy
     simp [List.head!]
     exact Nat.le_trans h3 (h2 x hx)

intro h2 x hx
   cases ys with
   | nil => simp at hx
   | cons y ys' =>
     simp at hx h2 ⊢
     have hy : (xs ++ y :: ys').head! ≤ y := h2 y (Or.inl rfl)
     cases hx with
     | inl heq => exact heq ▸ le_refl y
     | inr hm =>
       have hx' : (xs ++ y :: ys').head! ≤ x := h2 x (Or.inr hm)
       cases xs with
       | nil => simp at hx' ⊢; exact hx'
       | cons a as => simp at hy hx' ⊢; exact Nat.le_trans hy hx'

intro h2 x hx
   cases ys with
   | nil => simp at hx
   | cons y ys' =>
     simp [List.head!] at *
     have hy_mem : y ∈ y :: ys' := List.mem_cons_self y ys'
     have hxy := h2 y hy_mem
     have hxx := h2 x hx
     cases xs with
     | nil =>
       simp at h2
       exact h2 x hx
     | cons a as =>
       simp at h hxy hxx
       have hay := h y hy_mem
       omega

intro h2
   intro x hx
   cases xs with
   | nil => simp at h2; exact h2 x hx
   | cons a as =>
     simp at h h2
     have hys_head : ys.head! ≥ a := by
       cases ys with
       | nil => simp
       | cons b bs => exact h2.1
     have hx_ge_a : a ≤ x := h2.2 x hx
     cases ys with
     | nil => simp at hx
     | cons b bs =>
       simp at hx hys_head
       simp
       cases hx with
       | inl heq => exact le_refl b
       | inr hmem =>
         have : a ≤ x := h2.2 x (List.mem_cons_of_mem b hmem)
         calc b ≤ a := hys_head
              _ ≤ x := this

intro h2 x hx
   cases hys : ys with
   | nil => simp [hys] at hx
   | cons y ys' =>
     simp only [List.head!_cons]
     have h1 : (xs ++ y :: ys').head! ≤ y := h2 y (List.mem_cons_self y ys')
     have h2' : (xs ++ y :: ys').head! ≤ x := h2 x hx
     omega

intro h2 x hx
   cases xs with
   | nil => simp at h2; exact h2 x hx
   | cons a as =>
     simp at h h2
     have hhead : (a :: as ++ ys).head! = a := by simp [List.head!]
     rw [hhead] at h h2
     cases ys with
     | nil => simp at hx
     | cons b bs =>
       simp [List.head!]
       have hb : a ≤ b := h2.1
       have hx' : x ∈ b :: bs := hx
       cases List.mem_cons.mp hx' with
       | inl heq => rw [heq]
       | inr hmem => exact Nat.le_trans hb (h2.2 x hmem)

intro h2
   intro x hx
   cases xs with
   | nil => simp at h2; exact h2 x hx
   | cons a as =>
     simp at h h2
     have hys_head : ys.head! ≤ a := by
       cases ys with
       | nil => simp
       | cons b bs => exact h2.2 b (List.mem_cons_self b bs)
     have ha_le_x : a ≤ x := h2.2 x hx
     cases ys with
     | nil => simp at hx
     | cons b bs =>

       calc b ≤ a := h2.2 b (List.mem_cons_self b bs)
            _ ≤ x := ha_le_x

   cases xs with

   | cons a as =>

intro h2 x hx

     cases ys with

intro h' x hx
   cases ys with

   | cons y ys' =>
     simp only [List.head!_cons] at *
     exact Nat.le_trans (h' y (List.mem_cons_self y ys')) (h' x hx)

intro hy x hx
   cases hys : ys with

   | cons y ys' =>
     simp only [List.head!_cons]
     have mem_y : y ∈ y :: ys' := List.mem_cons_self y ys'
     have h1 := hy y mem_y
     have h2 := hy x hx
     cases xs with
     | nil => simp at h1 h2; omega
     | cons _ _ => simp at h1 h2; omega

   cases ys with
   | nil => contradiction
   | cons y ys' => simp only [List.head!_cons] at *; exact h' x hx

intro h2 x hx
   cases hys : ys with

     simp only [List.head!_cons]
     cases hxs : xs with

       have hy_mem : y ∈ y :: ys' := List.mem_cons_self y ys'
       have hx'y : x' ≤ y := h2 y hy_mem

       cases hx with

intro h2 x hx
   cases xs with

   | cons a as =>
